tasks.steps: [{"order": 1, "description": "Put the front butter in the top drawer of the cabinet."}, {"order": 2, "description": "Close the top drawer."}]

tasks.name: Open Drawer and Place Black Bowl Inside
tasks.description: Open the cabinet drawer and place the black bowl inside (LIBERO Kitchen Scene1).
tasks.steps: [{"order": 1, "description": "Open the cabinet drawer."}, {"order": 2, "description": "Pick up the black bowl."}, {"order": 3, "description": "Place the black bowl inside the open drawer."}]

tasks.name: Place Black Bowl on Plate
tasks.description: Place the black bowl on the plate (LIBERO Kitchen Scene5).
tasks.steps: [{"order": 1, "description": "Place akita black bowl on the plate"}]

tasks.name: Turn Off Stove
tasks.description: Turn off the stove (LIBERO Kitchen Scene8).
tasks.steps: [{"order": 1, "description": "Locate the stove knob."}, {"order": 2, "description": "Rotate the knob to the OFF position to turn off the stove."}]

tasks.name: Close Cabinet Top Drawer and Place Black Bowl on Top
tasks.description: Close the cabinet's top drawer and place the black bowl on top (LIBERO Kitchen Scene10).

tasks.name: Close Cabinet Bottom Drawer and Open Top Drawer
